initial_diagnostic_question.question: Does this ECG suggest the presence of typical premature ventricular complex(es)?

criterion_selection.question: To accurately diagnose typical premature ventricular complexes, which of the following diagnostic criteria should be evaluated?
options: Presence of grouped beating patterns separated by pauses
Presence of pathological Q waves in anterior leads
Presence of a fixed, rigid heart rate without variability
Presence of an irregularly irregular ventricular rhythm

finding_identification.question: Regarding the criterion you selected, are there any premature beats on this ECG, where a QRS complex occurs earlier than expected time based on the preceding normal cycles?

ecg_grounding.question: In which of the following segments can you observe the premature beat? The options below refer to time ranges on the ECG signal, provided in seconds.

diagnostic_decision.question: Based on the finding identified above, does this ECG suggest the presence of typical premature ventricular complex(es)?
options: Further findings are required to confirm the diagnosis
diagnostic_decision.answer: Further findings are required to confirm the diagnosis

criterion_selection.question: In addition to the finding you just identified, which other diagnostic criterion should be evaluated to diagnose typical premature ventricular complexes?
options: Absence of significant QRS prolongation in the premature beat compared to normal beats
Presence of flattened T waves in anterior leads
Presence of a Delta wave (slurred upstroke) on the premature beat
Presence of ST elevation in the premature beat
Presence of significant QRS prolongation in the premature beat compared to normal beats
criterion_selection.answer: Presence of significant QRS prolongation in the premature beat compared to normal beats

finding_identification.question: Regarding the criterion you selected, for the QRS complex in the selected segment, is the QRS duration prolonged significantly compared to the normal beats on this ECG?

ecg_grounding.question: Which range does the measured QRS duration for the premature beat fall into?

diagnostic_decision.question: Based on all the findings identified so far, does this ECG suggest the presence of typical premature ventricular complex(es)?
options: Further findings are required to confirm the diagnosis
